notes: Antigravity is a presession adapter (gemini-cli model): agy creates the <conv-id> brain dir at launch but writes .system_generated/logs/transcript.jsonl only after the first user input, so the ExactName{agy} scanner discovers the PID at the first tick (a proc-<PID> presession row bridges the gap) and the conv-id-keyed session is born + settles to ready ~1s later once the first turn's terminal MODEL/PLANNER_RESPONSE (no tool_calls) is parsed. Birth modeled as two phases; budgets anchor to recording start (agent launch). Observations omit cost/tokens — antigravity's JSONL carries no usage (tokens live in the per-conversation SQLite protobuf), so the parser surfaces none.

text: agy PID discovered within ~1s of launch (proc-<PID> presession row); cwd binds once the first turn runs a tool
Presession proc-<PID> row appears in ready at launch (before the transcript exists)
Conv-id-keyed session appears in ready after the first turn (when agy writes the transcript)
